basic_details.job_title: NIT Trichy Junior Research Fellow / Project Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: National Institute of Technology, Tiruchirappalli (NIT Trichy)
basic_details.post_name: Junior Research Fellow / Project Associate - I
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology, Tiruchirappalli (NIT Trichy) has published the Junior Research Fellow / Project Associate-I Notification 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 1 Junior Research Fellow / Project Associate-I position. Candidates with Graduate qualifications and within the age limit of less than 32 years for JRF and less than 35 years for Project Associate-I are eligible to apply through email. The application process will be active until 30-07-2026, and candidates can easily access the notification PDF and application details below.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.age_details: JRF: Less than 32 years, Project Associate-I: Less than 35 years
age_limit.details: Junior Research Fellow (JRF): Maximum age limit is 32 years. Project Associate - I: Maximum age limit is 35 years. Age relaxation will be as per Government of India norms.

qualification.details: Junior Research Fellow (JRF): B.E./B.Tech. with First Class (minimum 60% marks or 6.5 CGPA) in Chemical Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Computational Materials Science, Nanotechnology, or a closely related discipline from a recognized university/institute with a valid GATE qualification. M.E./M.Tech. with First Class (minimum 60% marks or 6.5 CGPA) in Chemical Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, Computational Materials Science, Nanotechnology, Mechanical Engineering, or a closely related discipline from a recognized university/institute. Project Associate-I: M.E./M.Tech. with First Class (minimum 60% marks or 6.5 CGPA) in Chemical Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, Computational Materials Science, Nanotechnology, Mechanical Engineering, Physics, Chemistry, Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning, Data Science, or a closely related discipline from a recognized university/institute. B.E./B.Tech. with First Class (minimum 60% marks or 6.5 CGPA) in relevant disciplines may also be considered, subject to the eligibility criteria prescribed by the funding agency.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Junior Research Fellow / Project Associate - I

post_wise_breakdown.post_name: Junior Research Fellow / Project Associate - I

salary_details.details: Junior Research Fellow (JRF): ₹37,000/month + HRA (First 2 years), ₹42,000/month + HRA (3rd year). Project Associate - I: ₹30,000/month + HRA (First 2 years), ₹33,000/month + HRA (3rd year).

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Trichy Junior Research Fellow / Project Associate - I Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 30-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

M.E./M.Tech. with First Class (minimum 60% marks or 6.5 CGPA) in Chemical Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, Computational Materials Science, Nanotechnology, Mechanical Engineering, or a closely related discipline from a recognized university/institute. Project Associate-I: M.E./M.Tech. with First Class (minimum 60% marks or 6.5 CGPA) in Chemical Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, Computational Materials Science, Nanotechnology, Mechanical Engineering, Physics, Chemistry, Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning, Data Science, or a closely related discipline from a recognized university/institute. B.E./B.Tech. with First Class (minimum 60% marks or 6.5 CGPA) in relevant disciplines may also be considered, subject to the eligibility criteria prescribed by the funding agency.

content_sections.heading: NIT Trichy Junior Research Fellow / Project Associate - I Selection Process 2026
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Trichy Junior Research Fellow / Project Associate - I Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 30-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NIT Trichy Junior Research Fellow / Project Associate - I Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NIT Trichy recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 30th July 2026. It is advisable to send your application well in advance of this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the JRF post?
faq.answer: For the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position, candidates need a B.E./B.Tech. with First Class and a valid GATE qualification, or an M.E./M.Tech. with First Class in relevant disciplines.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Project Associate-I position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project Associate-I position is 35 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per Government of India norms.

faq.question: Q4. How will candidates be selected for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for these positions will primarily involve an interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their qualifications and experience.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) post?
faq.answer: The Junior Research Fellow (JRF) will receive a stipend of ₹37,000/month + HRA for the first two years and ₹42,000/month + HRA for the third year, subject to performance.

faq.question: Q6. Can candidates with only a B.E./B.Tech. degree apply for the Project Associate-I role?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates with a B.E./B.Tech. with First Class in relevant disciplines may also be considered for the Project Associate-I position, subject to the eligibility criteria set by the funding agency.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications for this recruitment must be submitted via email. Candidates need to send their scanned application and supporting documents to the specified email address.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification does not mention any application fee for this recruitment drive. Candidates can apply without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q9. What is the project title for which this recruitment is being conducted?
faq.answer: The recruitment is for the project titled 'Next-Generation Molecular Dynamics Study to Elucidate Nucleation and Crystallization Mechanisms in Gas Storage Materials'.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the application format?
faq.answer: The prescribed application format is usually available on the institute's official website, www.nitt.edu. Candidates should download it from there.
